title: Add evaluation-level red-flag heuristics for pathological runs and mechanical failures
description:
## Summary
Add evaluation-level heuristic flagging for broad mechanical or pathological problems that are not item-local.

## Deliverables
- Detect conditions such as all predictions collapsing to one class, score results containing execution errors, or similar evaluation-wide failure signals.
- Define the evaluation-level flag payload and severity model.
- Keep these flags separate from per-item classification results.

## Notes
This task covers evaluation-wide red flags, not the per-item four-category classifier.
